ucs.title: [LLM] Salt Typhoon (Earth Estries) DLL side-loading via signed-binary relocated to non-default path (Demodex / GhostSpider / SparrowDoor loader)
ucs.description: Hunts the actor's signature loader pattern: a legitimately-signed third-party or Microsoft binary relocated to a writable non-default directory (ProgramData, Public, Temp, AppData, user roots) which then image-loads an unsigned/co-located DLL from the same folder. Salt Typhoon (CrowdStrike: not formally clustered; Microsoft: Salt Typhoon; Trend Micro: Earth Estries; ESET: FamousSparrow; Kaspersky: GhostEmperor) consistently abuses this exact technique to drop SparrowDoor, Demodex rootkit, GhostSpider and ShadowPad on telco / ISP / government targets.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_path!="C:\\Windows\\*" Processes.process_path!="C:\\Program Files*" (Processes.process_path="*\\ProgramData\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\Users\\Public\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\PerfLogs\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\Intel\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\Windows\\Temp\\*") (Processes.process_name IN ("K7SysMon.exe","K7SysMn1.exe","K7TSecurity.exe","BDReinit.exe","mscorsvw.exe","vmnat.exe","vmware.exe","GUP.exe","VLC.exe","AppLaunch.exe","InstallUtil.exe","NewLeakLog.exe","DiskSurveyor.exe","sllauncher.exe","securityhealthservice.exe","rc.exe") OR Processes.process_signature="Microsoft*") by host Processes.process_name Processes.process_path Processes.parent_process_name | rename Processes.* as * | join type=inner host process_path [ | tstats summariesonly=true values(Filesystem.file_name) as sideloaded_dll min(_time) as dll_time from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_name="*.dll") (Filesystem.file_path="*\\ProgramData\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Users\\Public\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Temp\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\PerfLogs\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Intel\\*") by host Filesystem.file_path | rename Filesystem.file_path as process_path | eval process_path=replace(process_path,"\\\\[^\\\\]+\.dll$","") ] | where firstTime > relative_time(now(),"-7d@d") | table firstTime host process_name process_path parent_process_name sideloaded_dll cmd | sort - firstTime
ucs.kql:
// Salt Typhoon / GhostEmperor / FamousSparrow side-load loader pattern
// Signed binary running outside its install path + co-located DLL load
let _suspect_dirs = dynamic([@"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\Intel\"]);
let _abused_carriers = dynamic(["k7sysmon.exe","k7sysmn1.exe","k7tsecurity.exe","bdreinit.exe","mscorsvw.exe","vmnat.exe","gup.exe","vlc.exe","applaunch.exe","installutil.exe","sllauncher.exe","securityhealthservice.exe","rc.exe","newleaklog.exe","disksurveyor.exe"]);
let _carrier_processes =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ (_abused_carriers)
        or (InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName has_any ("Microsoft","K7","VMware","VideoLAN")
            and FolderPath has_any (_suspect_dirs))
    | where FolderPath has_any (_suspect_dirs)
    | project CarrierTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              CarrierImage = FolderPath, CarrierName = FileName,
              CarrierCmd = ProcessCommandLine, CarrierSHA256 = SHA256,
              CarrierPID = ProcessId;
_carrier_processes
| join kind=inner (
    DeviceImageLoadEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where FolderPath has_any (_suspect_dirs)
    | where FileName endswith ".dll"
    | project LoadTime = Timestamp, DeviceId,
              LoaderPID = InitiatingProcessId,
              LoadedDll = FileName, LoadedPath = FolderPath,
              LoadedSHA256 = SHA256
  ) on DeviceId
| where LoaderPID == CarrierPID
| where LoadTime between (CarrierTime .. CarrierTime + 5m)
| where tolower(LoadedPath) startswith tolower(replace_regex(CarrierImage, @"[^\\]+$", ""))
| extend SuspectIndex = LoadedSHA256 != CarrierSHA256
// suppress legit MSI/installer churn — Salt Typhoon DLLs are persistent on disk
| join kind=leftanti (
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp between (ago(7d) .. ago(30m))
    | where FileName endswith ".dll"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("msiexec.exe","trustedinstaller.exe","setup.exe")
    | project DeviceId, LoadedDll = FileName, LoadedPath = FolderPath
  ) on DeviceId, LoadedDll, LoadedPath
| project CarrierTime, LoadTime, DeviceName, AccountName,
          CarrierName, CarrierImage, CarrierCmd, CarrierSHA256,
          LoadedDll, LoadedPath, LoadedSHA256
| order by CarrierTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Salt Typhoon side-loading — Sentinel ASIM port (works against MDE-->Sentinel or Sysmon EID 1+7)
let _suspect_dirs = dynamic([@"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\Intel\"]);
let _abused_carriers = dynamic(["k7sysmon.exe","k7sysmn1.exe","k7tsecurity.exe","bdreinit.exe","mscorsvw.exe","vmnat.exe","gup.exe","vlc.exe","applaunch.exe","installutil.exe","sllauncher.exe","securityhealthservice.exe","rc.exe"]);
let _carriers =
    ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
    | where TargetProcessName has_any (_abused_carriers)
        or (ActingProcessFileCompany has_any ("Microsoft","K7","VMware","VideoLAN")
            and TargetProcessName has_any (_suspect_dirs))
    | where TargetProcessName has_any (_suspect_dirs)
    | project CarrierTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname,
              ActorUsername, CarrierImage = TargetProcessName,
              CarrierCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine,
              CarrierPID = TargetProcessId, CarrierGuid = TargetProcessGuid;
_carriers
| join kind=inner (
    Event
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where Source == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon" and EventID == 7   // ImageLoad
    | extend ED = parse_xml(EventData)
    | extend LoadedImage = tostring(ED.DataItem.EventData.Data[5]["#text"]),
             LoaderGuid  = tostring(ED.DataItem.EventData.Data[1]["#text"]),
             Signed      = tostring(ED.DataItem.EventData.Data[10]["#text"])
    | where LoadedImage endswith ".dll"
    | where LoadedImage has_any (_suspect_dirs)
    | project LoadTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, LoaderGuid, LoadedImage, Signed
  ) on $left.DvcHostname == $right.Computer
| where LoaderGuid == CarrierGuid
| where LoadTime between (CarrierTime .. CarrierTime + 5m)
| where Signed =~ "false" or Signed =~ "unsigned"
| project CarrierTime, LoadTime, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
          CarrierImage, CarrierCmd, LoadedImage, Signed
| order by CarrierTime desc
ucs.rationale: DLL side-loading from a relocated signed binary in ProgramData / Public / Temp is the single most consistent across-campaign Salt Typhoon TTP — Trend Micro, Microsoft, and Kaspersky all attribute SparrowDoor, Demodex, ShadowPad and GhostSpider deployments to this exact carrier+DLL pair pattern. The combination of (a) signed legit binary running outside its install path, (b) co-located non-system D

ucs.title: [LLM] Salt Typhoon post-exploit credential & config harvest after Exchange / edge-device foothold (ntdsutil + WMIC + reg save SAM/SECURITY chain)
ucs.description: Hunts the actor's signature post-initial-access chain on telco / ISP / Microsoft Exchange targets: w3wp.exe (or a webshell-spawned shell) executes the Salt Typhoon credential-collection sequence — `ntdsutil ... ifm create full`, `reg save HKLM\SAM`, `reg save HKLM\SECURITY`, `reg save HKLM\SYSTEM`, plus WMIC shadowcopy/process-create lateral commands — within minutes of each other on the same host. Microsoft (Salt Typhoon), Mandiant (UNC4841/Earth Estries overlap) and CISA AA24-038A all describe this exact sequence following ProxyLogon / Citrix / Ivanti / Fortinet edge exploitation.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmds values(Processes.process_name) as procs dc(Processes.process_name) as distinct_procs from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("w3wp.exe","httpd.exe","java.exe","tomcat*.exe","sshd.exe") OR Processes.parent_process_path="*\\inetpub\\*" OR Processes.parent_process_path="*\\Exchange Server\\*" OR match(Processes.parent_process,"(?i)(webshell|aspnet_compiler|china[_ ]?chopper|ekern\.aspx)")) ((Processes.process_name="ntdsutil.exe" AND Processes.process="*ifm*") OR (Processes.process_name="reg.exe" AND Processes.process="*save*" AND Processes.process IN ("*HKLM\\SAM*","*HKLM\\SECURITY*","*HKLM\\SYSTEM*","*hklm\\sam*","*hklm\\security*","*hklm\\system*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND (Processes.process="*shadowcopy*create*" OR Processes.process="*process call create*" OR Processes.process="*/node:*")) OR (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*create shadow*") OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*comsvcs.dll*MiniDump*","*Invoke-NinjaCopy*","*Get-NTDS*","*Mimikatz*")) OR (Processes.process_name="makecab.exe" AND Processes.process IN ("*ntds*","*sam*","*system*","*security*")) OR (Processes.process_name="rar.exe" OR Processes.process_name="7z.exe" OR Processes.process_name="WinRAR.exe")) by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process_path _time span=30m | where distinct_procs >= 2 | where firstTime > relative_time(now(),"-7d@d") | rename Processes.* as * | sort - firstTime
ucs.kql:
// Salt Typhoon / Earth Estries post-exploit credential harvest chain
// (ProxyLogon / Citrix / Ivanti / Fortinet --> webshell --> ntdsutil + reg save + WMIC)
let _window = 30m;
let _webshell_parents = dynamic(["w3wp.exe","httpd.exe","java.exe","tomcat.exe","sshd.exe","agentbeat.exe"]);
let _suspicious_steps =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_webshell_parents)
        or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\inetpub\", @"\Exchange Server\", @"\HttpProxy\", @"\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\")
        or InitiatingProcessParentFileName in~ (_webshell_parents)
    | extend Step = case(
        FileName =~ "ntdsutil.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("ifm","create full","create rodc"), "ntdsutil_ifm",
        FileName =~ "reg.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "save" and ProcessCommandLine has_any (@"HKLM\SAM", @"HKLM\SECURITY", @"HKLM\SYSTEM", @"hklm\sam", @"hklm\security", @"hklm\system"), "reg_save_hive",
        FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("shadowcopy", "process call create", "/node:"), "wmic_lateral",
        FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "create shadow", "vss_create",
        FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("comsvcs.dll","MiniDump","Invoke-NinjaCopy","Get-NTDS","Mimikatz","DSInternals"), "ps_creddump",
        FileName =~ "makecab.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("ntds","sam","system","security"), "makecab_pack",
        FileName in~ ("rar.exe","winrar.exe","7z.exe","7za.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-hp","-p","a -m"), "archive_stage",
        FileName =~ "esentutl.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("/y","/vss","ntds.dit"), "esentutl_copy",
        "")
    | where Step != ""
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, Step, FileName,
              ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName,
              InitiatingProcessFolderPath, InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
_suspicious_steps
| summarize StepCount = dcount(Step),
            Steps = make_set(Step),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            Cmds = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 20),
            Parents = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, _window)
| where StepCount >= 2          // chain, not isolated step
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Salt Typhoon post-exploit credential harvest — Sentinel SecurityEvent (4688) port
let _window = 30m;
let _webshell_parents = dynamic(["w3wp.exe","httpd.exe","java.exe","tomcat.exe","sshd.exe"]);
let _steps =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend ChildName = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
             ParentName = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
    | where ParentName in (_webshell_parents)
        or ParentProcessName has_any (@"\inetpub\", @"\Exchange Server\", @"\HttpProxy\", @"\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\")
    | extend Step = case(
        ChildName == "ntdsutil.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("ifm","create full","create rodc"), "ntdsutil_ifm",
        ChildName == "reg.exe" and CommandLine has "save" and CommandLine has_any (@"HKLM\SAM", @"HKLM\SECURITY", @"HKLM\SYSTEM"), "reg_save_hive",
        ChildName == "wmic.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("shadowcopy","process call create","/node:"), "wmic_lateral",
        ChildName == "vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "create shadow", "vss_create",
        ChildName in ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has_any ("comsvcs.dll","MiniDump","Invoke-NinjaCopy","Get-NTDS","Mimikatz","DSInternals"), "ps_creddump",
        ChildName == "makecab.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("ntds","sam","system","security"), "makecab_pack",
        ChildName in ("rar.exe","winrar.exe","7z.exe","7za.exe") and CommandLine has_any ("-hp","-p","a -m"), "archive_stage",
        ChildName == "esentutl.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("/y","/vss","ntds.dit"), "esentutl_copy",
        "")
    | where Step != ""
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, Step, ChildName, CommandLine, ParentName, ParentProcessName;
_steps
| summarize StepCount = dcount(Step),
            Steps = make_set(Step),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            Cmds = make_set(CommandLine, 20),
            Parents = make_set(ParentName)
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, _window)
| where StepCount >= 2
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Salt Typhoon's defining post-exploit pattern across telecom and US-government incidents (CISA AA24-038A, Microsoft TI 'Salt Typhoon Briefing', Trend Micro 'Earth Estries' reporting) is webshell-on-Exchange / edge-device-foothold followed within minutes by `ntdsutil ifm create full`, `reg save HKLM\SAM|SECURITY|SYSTEM`, and WMIC for both shadow-copy NTDS extraction and lateral process-create. Detec
